parents.subject: LU-18448 llite: disable dir read on open by default

commit.subject: LU-18687 compat: remove Lustre specific macros
commit.message:
LU-18687 compat: remove Lustre specific macros

The compatibility layer should compile independently
of LNet and Lustre, since it is the base layer upon
which LNet and Lustre will rest. Remove the dependency
on Lustre/LNet macros.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I112dad27271fa28430ecc4c4b78bfd57d5583ea0
